Parsing your resume. Autofilling key fields...

Our company language is English so we'd appreciate an English version of your CV in order for all of our hiring team members to understand.

or drag and drop here

or drag and drop here

This is your chance to shine and stand out!

Transparency is key for us and one of our working principles here at NeoTaste. It would therefore be great to know if we’re more or less aligned on the compensation so please state your preferred gross annual salary. Don’t worry, this is not rejection criteria and we are more than happy to discuss this topic further during the first interview.

Let's check if our timelines match! We would love to get you on board sooner rather than later - Please note, this is usually not going to be a determining factor.
